entities.name: RequirementChunk
entities.definition: A normalized, uniquely-identified segment of a requirement document after ingestion and tokenization.

entities.name: AlignmentDecision
entities.definition: A recorded mapping verdict that links a new domain concept to an existing organizational entity, noting confidence and rationale.

entities.name: AnalysisPipeline
entities.definition: Ordered sequence of analysis skills (ingest → extract → align) that transforms requirements into domain-aligned concepts.

vocabulary_terms.definition: A normalized, uniquely-identified segment of a requirement document
A recorded mapping verdict linking a new concept to an existing organizational entity
Ordered sequence of analysis skills transforming requirements into domain-aligned concepts
